overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing a character riding a horse through the vibrant countryside of Toussaint. The journey passes through vineyard estates with stone towers, open meadows with wildflowers, and rural paths with distant mountain views.

events.description: armored rider on white horse passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a winding dirt path through rolling green hills with wooden fences

notable_agents.action: armored knight riding a white horse passing in the opposite direction

low moss-covered stone wall on the right side of the path
tall cylindrical stone tower with orange tiled roof visible in the distance
winding dirt trail cutting through grassy countryside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny countryside path bordered by wooden fences and stone walls. The rider approaches a village with distinctive stone towers while passing an armored knight on a white horse coming from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: vineyard estate with historic stone towers

agents.ego_description: riding through rows of vineyards with stone towers prominent on the left side

small rustic building with straw roof among the trees

segments.scene_description: The path leads through a vineyard estate with historic stone towers looming on the left. Workers tend to the grapevines while the camera passes between rows of lush greenery and rustic thatched buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with scattered cypress trees

events.description: exiting vineyard area into open grassland with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: riding through open countryside passing workers tending to bushes along the path

notable_agents.action: deer running across the path from left to right

entered.detail: tall narrow evergreen tree standing prominently on the right side
field of tall grass and colorful wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Leaving the vineyards behind, the scene opens into a meadow filled with wildflowers and tall grass. A deer crosses the path ahead while workers tend to bushes, and a large cypress tree stands prominently on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling hills with snow-capped mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: riding toward a distant village with a prominent snow-capped mountain visible ahead

notable_agents.action: herd of horses grazing in the field to the left

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain dominating the horizon ahead
broken wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
cluster of houses with red roofs on the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The final stretch reveals a breathtaking view of a massive snow-capped mountain in the distance. The path winds through open fields where horses graze, bordered by broken wooden fences, heading toward a village nestled on the hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny rural path that transitions from an open countryside road into the heart of a lush vineyard estate. It begins by traveling past wooden fences and stone walls, passing an armored knight on a white horse as the rider approaches a village characterized by distinctive stone towers. As the path leads further inward, the scenery shifts toward a historic estate where the towers loom closer on the left. The camera then glides between rows of lush greenery and rustic thatched buildings, passing workers tending to the grapevines before the shot concludes within the verdant vineyard.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cultivated edges of a vineyard into a vast, open wilderness dominated by a distant mountain peak. It begins by leaving the vineyards behind and opening into a vibrant meadow filled with wildflowers and tall grass, where a deer crosses the path and workers tend to nearby bushes. As the camera moves past a prominent cypress tree, the landscape expands into wide open fields bordered by broken wooden fences and grazing horses. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, revealing a breathtaking view of a massive snow-capped mountain. Finally, the path winds through the rural terrain, heading toward a small village nestled on the hillside.
